name: Cheese Pepper Dip
recipeIngredient: 6 red or green bell peppers, roasted and peeled
tortilla chips OR fresh corn tortillas
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the chilies and bell peppers into thin strips.
2. Slowly melt the Asadero cheese over low flame.
3. Add the sliced chilies, garlic, and cilantro to the melted cheese and stir with a wooden spoon.
4. Add salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve with tortilla chips or fresh corn tortillas.
